'''âf-y-h''' ('''kafayah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumpang|tumpang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumpang|tumpang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafayah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifayah|thifayah]] || [[word:jifayah|jifayah]] || [[word:shifayah|shifayah]] || [[word:kifayah|kifayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufayah|thuthufayah]] || [[word:jujufayah|jujufayah]] || [[word:shushufayah|shushufayah]] || [[word:kukufayah|kukufayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufayah|thufayah]] || [[word:jufayah|jufayah]] || [[word:shufayah|shufayah]] || [[word:kufayah|kufayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufayah|thufayah]] || [[word:jufayah|jufayah]] || [[word:shufayah|shufayah]] || [[word:kufayah|kufayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefayah|thefayah]] || [[word:jefayah|jefayah]] || [[word:shefayah|shefayah]] || [[word:kefayah|kefayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofayah|thothofayah]] || [[word:jojofayah|jojofayah]] || [[word:shoshofayah|shoshofayah]] || [[word:kokofayah|kokofayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofayah|thofayah]] || [[word:jofayah|jofayah]] || [[word:shofayah|shofayah]] || [[word:kofayah|kofayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofayah|thofayah]] || [[word:jofayah|jofayah]] || [[word:shofayah|shofayah]] || [[word:kofayah|kofayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfayah|thĂŠfayah]] || [[word:jĂŠfayah|jĂŠfayah]] || [[word:shĂŠfayah|shĂŠfayah]] || [[word:kĂŠfayah|kĂŠfayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafayah|thathafayah]] || [[word:jajafayah|jajafayah]] || [[word:shashafayah|shashafayah]] || [[word:kakafayah|kakafayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafayah|thafayah]] || [[word:jafayah|jafayah]] || [[word:shafayah|shafayah]] || [[word:kafayah|kafayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafayah|thafayah]] || [[word:jafayah|jafayah]] || [[word:shafayah|shafayah]] || [[word:kafayah|kafayah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafayah|shafayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafayah|goshafayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafayah|gokishafayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafayahnĂŒ|shafayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafayahnknĂŒ|goshafayahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayahnĂŒ|gokishafayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafayahshĂ«|shafayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafayahnkshĂ«|goshafayahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafayahshĂ«|gokishafayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayahro|shafayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayahnkro|goshafayahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayahro|gokishafayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayahmu|shafayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayahnkmu|goshafayahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayahmu|gokishafayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafayahsher|shafayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafayahnksher|goshafayahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafayahsher|gokishafayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafayahng|shafayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafayahnkng|goshafayahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafayahng|gokishafayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafayahya|shafayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafayahnkya|goshafayahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafayahya|gokishafayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafayahyam|shafayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafayahnkyam|goshafayahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafayahyam|gokishafayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayahnĂŒshĂ«|shafayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafayahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayahnĂŒro|shafayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayahnknĂŒro|goshafayahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayahnĂŒro|gokishafayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayahnĂŒmu|shafayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayahnknĂŒmu|goshafayahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayahnĂŒmu|gokishafayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayahshĂ«nĂŒ|shafayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayahshĂ«ro|shafayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayahnkshĂ«ro|goshafayahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayahshĂ«ro|gokishafayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayahshĂ«mu|shafayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayahnkshĂ«mu|goshafayahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayahshĂ«mu|gokishafayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayahronĂŒ|shafayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayahnkronĂŒ|goshafayahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayahronĂŒ|gokishafayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayahroshĂ«|shafayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayahnkroshĂ«|goshafayahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayahroshĂ«|gokishafayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayahromu|shafayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayahnkromu|goshafayahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayahromu|gokishafayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayahmunĂŒ|shafayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayahnkmunĂŒ|goshafayahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayahmunĂŒ|gokishafayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayahmushĂ«|shafayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayahnkmushĂ«|goshafayahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayahmushĂ«|gokishafayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayahmuro|shafayahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayahnkmuro|goshafayahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayahmuro|gokishafayahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
